Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaron F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIt17sz09FkPEHYnAjDv-S2eyaqMujGJMk1LRXNU2EFa8AFjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thought my roof was leaking. I would definitely recommend them for anyone looking for a roof replacement or repair.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"haylcroz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjVi7HCprdbZLcceFo5VKRsJ-xTyDzfMv556pWBxM399edeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a roof leak due to an old venting pipe. Royce and his team responded to the phone straight away and were able to stop by the same day and make a permanent fix. The the team was polite, efficient, effective, and a fair price for work done. I 100% recommend and will use them if we ever need more work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Winter Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_BVyrj30wlQyKWlo-dus9CIKlyqMVmdEUg_5ti3n7KPQIRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give negative stars, I would. I was in the process of purchasing a home in Trail and needed a roof inspection. I contacted Trail Roofing, stipulated that I was willing and able to pay for the service. I was told that an inspection could take place within a couple of days. The day after I called Trail Roofing, I received a voice mail from Jackie and returned her call. She stated that they would not complete a physical inspection but instead, looked at photos online and deemed that the house I wanted to buy required a new roof. I contacted a different roofing contractor in Trail who conducted a physical inspection and told me the roof is in good shape and requires repairs. I was quoted $1,260 for those repairs. Trail Roofing: you are dishonest!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob MCQUEEN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3dZptup1I2UsFnrnL2LpQKkfaq4WXnFThyMAKrGC1yZewCzw9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After waiting a year for another contractor who was a no-show, I contacted Trail Roofing.  They gave a fair estimate, with a quick timeline. They started the job when they said they would, and met their estimated time of 3 days for strip down and install.  That was pretty impressive for our four separate roofs.  Very quick and I considered good quality.  They were safety conscious, kept the job site clean daily, and had a big and experienced crew for the job.  I downloaded a WCB clearance letter which said they had WorkSafe BC insurance coverage.  One of my concerns was poor roof venting which had caused ice dams in recent winters.  I liked the vents they used, and a bonus realized the vents also helped in hot summer weather to somewhat cool the roof.  I have no problem in recommending Trail Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heidi Muller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgd329NwbLgPAgrRTHIQ1kn0ljLAuq4kGZtDSWxma77CgrdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Trail roofing crew were professional, thorough and tidy. They were quick to schedule my roof in and had it all completed in less than then 3 days even over Kootenay pass in Creston.  They were innovative and repaired and patched the parts of the roof with problems. Thank you for your excellent work, knowledge and superior skills.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Millard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLVa_w69lN1uiV4r4jXJ1SmvqRB5y9Qai7j0TVbTb1u0BfyeQDRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These people were incredible,professional,and a pleasure to have here.
The roof is beyond anything I hoped for.
The work and the crew were spectacular.","Images":null,"When":""}]
